Package neqsim.process.safety.cfd

package neqsim.process.safety.cfd
CFD source-term handoff schemas and exporters for safety dispersion studies.

The package provides a neutral JSON contract for carrying NeqSim release source terms, compositions, weather cases, inventory basis and consequence branches into external CFD and commercial consequence-analysis tools. Simulator-specific exporters should build on the neutral CfdSourceTermCase payload.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
  • Related Packages

    Description
    neqsim.process.safety

    Class
    Description
    CfdSourceTermCase
    Versioned CFD source-term handoff case for detailed safety dispersion simulations.
    CfdSourceTermCase.Builder
    Builder for CFD source-term cases.
    CfdSourceTermCase.ValidationResult
    Validation result for a CFD source-term case.
    CfdSourceTermExporter
    Exports CfdSourceTermCase payloads to neutral JSON and CFD starter files.
